title: gymnadenia hygrophila
intro: Gymnadenia hygrophila, also known as the marsh fragrant orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gymnadenia hygrophila include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
